error.account_blocked: Your account has been blocked by Verisure. Use 'Forgot password' on the Verisure website to reset your password and unblock your account, then try again
error.otp_expired: Verification code expired — a new code will be sent
error.otp_send_failed: Failed to send verification code — please try again

abort.no_refresh_token: Login succeeded but Verisure did not return a refresh token. The integration cannot persist credentials safely. Please try again later or report this if it persists.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Verisure
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password to reconnect.

phone_list.description: Which phone number should we use to send you a code via SMS?
phone_list.title: Verisure 2FA

otp_challenge.description: Enter the code you received on your phone
otp_challenge.title: Verisure 2FA

data.code: PIN code (leave empty for no PIN)
data.code_arm_required: Also require PIN code (if any) to arm alarm

data.notify_group: Notify service for arming exceptions (e.g. mobile_app_phone)
data.force_arm_notifications: Built-in force-arm notifications (disable to use your own automations)

data.scan_interval: Update scan interval in seconds (0 disables auto-updates)

mappings.title: Alarm State Mappings
mappings.description: These mappings apply to the main panel only. Map each Home Assistant alarm action to a Verisure alarm mode; leave a field blank to hide that button.{subpanels_note}

lock_automations.title: Lock automation
lock_automations.description: Configure each lock's automatic locking and panel-disarming behaviour.

force_arm.name: Force arm
force_arm.description: Force-arm the alarm, overriding non-blocking exceptions (e.g. open windows) from a previous failed arm attempt.

code.name: PIN code
code.description: Optional. If supplied, validated against the configured PIN before completing the force-arm. Most callers don't need this — the prior arm attempt that produced the force-arm context already validated the PIN.

force_arm_cancel.name: Cancel force arm
force_arm_cancel.description: Cancel a pending force-arm and dismiss the arming-exception notification.

unsupported_alarm_mode.message: This alarm mode is not supported by your panel (rejected: {tried}). Check the state mappings in the integration options (Settings → Devices & Services → Verisure OWA → Configure).

no_supported_command.message: No supported command found for this panel. Check the state mappings in the integration options (Settings → Devices & Services → Verisure OWA → Configure).

restart_required_after_migration.title: Restart required to finish Verisure OWA upgrade

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant?
confirm.description: Your Securitas Direct integration has been migrated to Verisure OWA. Restarting brings the migrated entries online — your devices, entities, and customisations are preserved. Click the Learn more link for the renamed services, events, and Lovelace cards.
